intended_use_full: Follicle Clarity Software is a software application package. It is designed to view and quantify image data acquired on compatible ultrasound systems. Follicle Clarity is used as an aid to interpreting clinicians by calculating the number and size of ovarian follicles in a transvaginal ultrasound volume sweep of the ovaries.
ground_truth: Manual ultrasonographer measurements and SonoAVC measurements (predicate device measurements)
other_metrics: Median follicle size (mm) and follicle count comparison; stated that 'Follicle Clarity tracking and measurement accuracy was within the margin of error for human measurements' in phantom and clinical validation trials; 'Follicle Clarity met the predetermined endpoints and demonstrated substantially equivalent performance in identifying the number and size of follicles'
